name: HMS Loch Lomond (K 437)
events: 7 Mar 1945 HMS Uproar (Lt. J.N. Devlin, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises conducted A/S exercises in Inner Sound (off Loch Alsh) with HMS Loch Lomond (Lt.Cdr. R.E.H. Partington, RD, RNR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
